candidates.why: Direct total top-line revenue label; preferred over Net Sales as the broader revenue line.
Also a valid top-line sales label and equals Total Revenue in the preview; useful fallback if labels vary by year.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels across years.

candidates.why: Best aggregate direct production/service cost line; sits in cost section above operating profit and captures raw materials/services consumed.
Component of direct costs, but narrower than the broader Materials and services line.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not an income statement expense; not suitable for COGS.
Balancing row and should be excluded.

variables.notes: Selected the broad direct-cost expense line rather than a narrower component or balancing row.

candidates.why: Can be operating overhead, but may overlap with direct production costs depending on classification.
Personnel cost line and a strong SG&A/overhead component.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related overhead component.
Closest broad overhead bucket and populated across years; useful especially because explicit SG&A is missing in 2025.
Explicit SG&A line; per rule, should be included when present.
Explicit SG&A-related label but appears unpopulated in preview and less useful than populated rows.
Possible subcomponent of other operating expenses, but likely overlaps with the broader Other operating expenses row.
Dedicated R&D line exists, but it appears below EBIT in the preview, so should not be added to XSGA under the placement rule.
Explicit SG&A label but appears unpopulated in preview; weaker than Selling/General/Administrative Expense.
Potential overhead component but unpopulated and less specific than the explicit stock-based compensation row.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement SG&A expense.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A exists but is missing in 2025, so following the hierarchy rule, included that row plus broader/closest overhead buckets for coverage. Excluded R&D because the only R&D row appears below EBIT in the sheet order.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense label.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists. It appears below EBIT in the preview order, so it is mapped to XRD but not also added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Best explicit interest expense line for 2024-2021.
Too broad and includes non-interest finance costs.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Hybrid Debt Instruments - Equity
candidates.why: Looks more like preferred/hybrid financing distribution adjustment than ordinary interest expense.
Lease-interest only; too narrow as primary XINT line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure only; too narrow as primary XINT line.

variables.notes: The candidate list misses the clearly relevant 2025 line 'Interest Expense/Income - Net', which is the best available interest-related row for that year. Added it as higher-priority fallback ahead of the explicit interest expense line used in earlier years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest Expense/Income - Net

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Hybrid Debt Instruments - Equity
candidates.why: Not an equity balance sheet line.
Income statement attribution line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Ideal owner-equity concept, but preview is blank for shown years.
Only a component of equity, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Best populated owner-equity line and excludes non-controlling interests.
Usable only if no owner-equity line exists; here owner-equity line does exist.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of the company
Equity attributable to the equity holders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity to avoid double counting minority interests. Included both owner-equity labels as a priority list because labeling may vary by year.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not a balance sheet minority-interest balance.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest label.
Alternative balance sheet minority-interest label.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list. BE uses owner equity, so MIB is kept separate to avoid double counting.
